details: Beginning SFPU analysis for PRELU_SFPU operation
Starting SFPU kernel analysis for ELU unary operation
Beginning SFPU analysis for DROPOUT operation
Reading ELU API header: tt_metal/hw/inc/api/compute/eltwise_unary/elu.h
SELU uses eltwise_sfpu.cpp, selu_tile(idst, param0, param1), selu_tile_init(). Params: scale and alpha as uint32_t bit-cast floats.

DROPOUT uses dedicated experimental compute kernel dropout_kernel.cpp, API header dropout.h, dispatches via SFPU_UNARY_PARAMS_KERNEL_EXTRA_ARGS(calculate_dropout, RC, APPROX, idst, probability, scale_factor)
Found PRELU_SFPU in unary_op_utils.cpp: compute kernel=eltwise_sfpu.cpp, init=prelu_tile_init(), func=prelu_tile(idst, param0_hex), approx_mode=false (default)

Read calculate_selu: branches on v>=0 (scale*x) or v<0 (scale*alpha*(exp(x)-1)). Uses _sfpu_exp_21f_bf16_<true> for exp, PolynomialEvaluator for polynomial, float_to_fp16b for rounding. WH and BH implementations identical.

DROPOUT uses DropoutProgramFactory, math_approx_mode=false, probability and scale passed as compile-time args, seed as runtime arg. APPROX comes from ComputeConfig.math_approx_mode passed as compiler define.

Read all abstraction layers: API header (prelu.h), macros (llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_macros.h), params dispatch (llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_params.h for WH and BH), init (llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_init.h), SFPU kernel (ckernel_sfpu_prelu.h for WH and BH), converter (ckernel_sfpu_converter.h)
SFPU ISA page retrieved, now searching for SFPMOV, SFPIADD, SFPSETSGN, SFPENCC, SFPMUL, SFPLOADI, SFPLOAD, SFPSTORE instructions

Consulted Confluence SFPU ISA page (1170505767) for instruction semantics: SFPLOAD, SFPSTORE, SFPMAD, SFPSETCC, SFPCOMPC, SFPENCC, SFPPUSHC, SFPPOPC. These map to the SFPI abstractions used in calculate_prelu (dst_reg load/store, v_if comparison, vFloat multiply).
All source files read and verified. Writing selu_analysis.md to .claude-analysis/rrelu-1/.

All research complete. PRELU_SFPU uses SFPI Style A kernel. Key findings: (1) Kernel is simple conditional multiply on negative values, (2) Uses v_if/v_endif for predicated execution, (3) VectorMode::RC processes all 4 faces, (4) ADDR_MOD_7 with all zeros (no auto-increment). Writing analysis file.
Queried DeepWiki about v_if/v_endif CC mechanism and Converter::as_float utility
Wrote analysis file: .claude-analysis/rrelu-1/prelu_sfpu_analysis.md. Proceeding to commit.
SELU SFPU analysis committed as .claude-analysis/rrelu-1/selu_analysis.md. Commit: c05f0d0d13.
All source code reads and DeepWiki queries complete. Writing analysis file.
All research complete. Constructing dropout_analysis.md with CC State Machine diagram (Style B kernel with TTI instructions and CC manipulation)

CC.En must be 1 for dropout predicated execution to work. SFPENCC(0,0,0,0) preserves CC.En=1 and resets CC.Res=1. SFPIADD sets CC.Res per lane for the conditional zero-out. The initial CC.En=1 state comes from hardware default or prior SFPU context.
dropout_analysis.md written to .claude-analysis/rrelu-1/. Contains full SFPU kernel analysis with CC State Machine diagram.
ELU SFPU analysis committed successfully as .claude-analysis/rrelu-1/elu_analysis.md
